packageInfoDetail.updateDesc:
相机
• 优化主摄、广角视频模式清晰度表现
• 修复微信视频通话概率性出现卡顿问题
应用
• 新增日历字体支持随系统字体大小调整
• 新增秒表支持在流体云显示
系统
• 新增支持风驰游戏内核，提升游戏体验
• 提升系统稳定性
• 更新 Android 安全补丁至 2025 年 1 月，提升系统安全性

相机
• 优化人像、照片模式预览及成像清晰度
• 优化开启 4K 60FPS 录制视频时的清晰度
• 优化主摄、长焦照片模式色彩表现
• 优化照片模式下使用后置摄像头拍照个别场景偏亮问题
通信互联
• 优化 WLAN 场景 IPV6 上网体验
• 提升蓝牙连接稳定性和兼容性
应用
• 水印全面升级，新增大量款式与自定义能力，覆盖哈苏定制、大师印记、胶卷、经典相机等系列
• 实况照片支持编辑参数回溯，裁剪旋转、调节、滤镜、水印编辑保存后，效果可复原重调
• 新增通话摘要、全局语音摘要、AI 消除支持端侧 AI 大模型，无网也可使用
系统
• 新增充电流体云，增强充电状态提醒，减少桌面全屏充电动画干扰
• 优化音频效果
• 提升系统稳定性与流畅性

相机
 • 人像模式支持全局 EV 曝光调整功能，更加轻松自如的控制曝光进行照片创作
 • 优化 AI 证件照功能交互，如优化人像引导框、增加拍照倒计时、优化提示语等，提升拍摄体验
 • 提升照片模式色彩表现
 • 优化微距特写清晰度
 • 优化实况照片清晰度
 • 优化相机启动及切换过程概率偏色问题
 • 优化三方相机室外曝光偏亮问题
通信互联
 • 新增支持与 iOS 一碰互传功能，双端触碰即可互传图片与文件
 • 优化网络连接稳定性，提升信号质量和通话质量
 • 更新 WLAN 固件，提升 WLAN 上网稳定性
应用
 • 新增相册连拍合集页内支持预览缩放
 • 新增生日、倒数日、纪念日、节假日日历卡片
 • 电话本新增支持浮窗显示
系统
 • 优化部分场景功耗表现
 • 新增支持拖拽浮窗底角至最大值，松手后浮窗应用即可全屏显示
 • 新增手电筒支持在流体云上显示开启状态
 • 新增支持在应用全屏时，向左上滑可快速启动分屏
 • 优化流体云显示效果，使得常用图标可以在状态栏右侧正常显示
 • 优化三方应用音频体验
 • 更新 Android 安全补丁至 2024 年 11 月，提升系统安全性

相机
 • 优化照片模式月亮拍摄效果
 • 优化照片模式锐化程度及低概率噪声问题
 • 优化照片及视频模式色彩表现
 • 优化照片模式主摄长焦预览清晰度
 • 优化前置微信视频通话效果
系统
 • 优化部分场景功耗表现
 • 优化三方应用音频体验
 • 提升系统稳定性
packageInfoDetail.updateDescEnglish:
Camera
Improves moon photographs taken in Photo mode.
Fixes an issue with the sharpness and noise in photos taken in Photo mode.
Improves the color performance in Photo and Video modes.
Improves the clarity of the preview image for the main telephoto camera in Photo mode.
Improves the quality of WeChat video calls with the front camera.
System
Reduces power consumption in some scenarios.
Improves the audio experience in third-party apps.
Improves system stability.

packageInfoDetail.updateDesc:
【AI】
新增一拖即问，文本、文件、图片可一步拖至屏幕下方的小布胶囊，快速解析，随心提问

【应用】
新增翻译应用，整合拍照翻译、对话翻译、同声传译、实时字幕等多种翻译功能，并支持更多语种互译，让你随时随地畅译无阻
新增快捷功能卡片，将长辈常用功能纳入其中，一键直达
新增游戏静音启动功能，开启后启动游戏时自动静音，避免打扰（游戏时打开游戏助手-工具-游戏静音启动）
新增应用建议卡支持长按应用将其设置为“不再推荐”，减少干扰
优化相册图片误删除问题，通过即时通知引导你前往相册“最近删除”查看

【安全隐私】
新增文件管理、便签和相册的最近删除入口支持密码校验，防止隐私泄露
新增在手机管家的清理存储中，支持点击“存储情况”查看内存占用详情
新增屏幕共享过程中支持屏蔽敏感应用和通知，保护隐私安全（设置-隐私-屏幕共享保护）
新增支持在更改密码 4 天内，若忘记密码，可通过旧密码重置

【通信互联】
新增支持手机与 Windows 电脑 O+互联，实现跨端文件管理，让办公更方便
新增小布通话支持智能识别外卖、快递、打车等高频来电场景，不仅能自动接听电话，还支持自定义回复话术；通话结束后，小布会生成智能摘要，并为你标识重点内容
新增支持个人热点开启时也能使用互传功能跨端分享文件
优化手机查找功能，支持在主动关机或低电量自动关机时也能被发现，用机更放心

【系统】
新增旁路供电功能，游戏时分流电源直接向手机供电，边玩边充也不伤电池，有效降低手机发热情况，带来更加出色的游戏体验
新增通知堆叠效果，优化锁屏通知视觉和交互，视觉更美观，操作更简单
新增锁屏界面向右滑动也可以进入乐划锁屏
新增内容拖拽设置项，支持长按拖拽三方应用中的图片和文字（设置-辅助功能-内容拖拽）
新增游戏内浮窗跳转功能，开启后在部分游戏内跳转至其它应用时，该应用将以浮窗打开（设置-辅助功能-自由浮窗-浮窗跳转）
新增浮窗大小与位置记忆功能
优化抽屉模式视觉和交互，视觉更一致，操作更便捷
优化系统界面及图标，更美观
优化浮窗、分屏应用窗口动效与兼容性，提升使用体验
更新 Android 安全补丁至 2025 年 5 月，提升系统安全性
packageInfoDetail.updateDescEnglish:
【AI】
You can now drag and drop text, images, or photos to Breeno and ask questions about them.

【Apps】
Adds the Translate app, which allows you to take photos of text to translate, as well as translate conversations and documents. It also includes live translation and supports additional languages.
Adds a new widget with quick functions specifically tailored to elderly users to enhance usability.
You can now open games in muted mode when you want a distraction-free gaming experience. This feature can be found in "Game Assistant - Tools - Play games muted".
You can now stop receiving specific app suggestions. Just touch and hold a suggestion and select "Stop recommending".
Fixes an issue where photos might be accidentally deleted by a third-party app. When this happens, you will receive a notification to review deleted photos in Recently deleted.

【Security & privacy】
You can now protect your recently deleted items in the My Files, Notes, and Photos apps with a password for added privacy.
You can view storage usage by apps and the system when freeing up space using Phone Manager.
During Screen sharing, you can block specific apps and notifications to protect your privacy. This feature is available in "Settings - Privacy - Screen sharing protection".
After changing your Lock screen password, you can reset it using the previous password.

【Communication & interconnection】
The O+ Connect app now supports Windows, allowing you to connect your mobile device to a Windows computer and manage files across devices effortlessly.
Breeno Call can automatically identify food delivery, package delivery, ride-hailing, and other calls, and answer these calls on your behalf. You can customize the responses as needed. After a call ends, a summary highlighting key points will generated.
Sharing files with nearby devices now works seamlessly, even when your personal hotspot is active.
Your devices are now findable even when they are powered off, either automatically or manually.

【System】
Introduces bypass charging, which supplies power directly to the phone instead of the battery when you're playing a game, reducing device heat significantly.
Improves the visuals for individual notifications, notification stacks, and user interactions with these notifications on the Lock screen.
You can now enter Lock Screen Magazine by swiping right on the Lock screen.
Adds the Drag & drop feature that allows you to use the gesture to perform actions on images and text in third-party apps. This feature can be turned on or off in "Settings - Accessibility & convenience - Drag & drop".
You can now open a floating window when redirected to another app from a game. This feature can be turned on or off in "Settings - Accessibility & convenience - Floating Window - Redirect via floating window".
The size and position of floating windows are now saved for more convenient usage.
Redesigns the app drawer for a more consistent visual style, improving usability throughout the interface.
Improves the user interface and icon designs.
Improves the animations and compatibility for floating windows and Split View.
Integrates the May 2025 Android security patch to enhance system security.

packageInfoDetail.updateDesc:
【自在 AI 每一刻】
新增小布建议生活缴费卡片，通过提取短信中水电、燃气的费用信息，提醒你及时缴费，为生活带来便利
新增在小布建议和流体云上，显示小布记忆中保存的已购电影票，方便核销观影
新增在小布建议和流体云上，显示小布记忆中保存的已购景点门票，方便刷码入园
新增在小布建议上，显示小布记忆中保存的酒店订房信息，进行酒店入住提醒
新增桌面超级小布入口，将桌面分页符全搜入口替换为小布助手，唤醒小布更方便

【开启流畅新境界】
优化自由浮窗进入、调整位置、切换大小等操作动画，更流畅

【处处有细节，细节有惊喜】
新增官方浏览器支持部分文档处理工具：文档摘要、文档翻译、转为 PDF、转为 Word、转为 Excel
新增分屏支持无极调节窗口比例。双应用横屏分屏显示时，拖动分隔条，可自由调整分屏大小
新增在私密保险箱中可分享图片和视频
新增在私密保险箱中可自定义图片或视频图集封面
新增在私密保险箱中可按照时间排序查看图片和视频，查找更方便
新增在私密保险箱的其他文件分类中可直接添加文件进行加密，操作更方便
新增融合桌面-小窗支持切换使用经典投屏，导航音乐两不误
新增当最近任务为堆叠样式时，支持在最近任务界面下滑应用卡片修改应用锁定状态
优化在文档中一次性添加文件到私密保险箱的数量限制，由 500 个修改为不限制个数
优化短信删除逻辑，全选删除消息时不需要再进行指纹或密码验证，可直接删除
优化了车载投屏音乐胶囊的界面布局，可以直接在音乐胶囊上播放、暂停、切换歌曲
优化时钟相关卡片切换逻辑，跟随系统亮暗色切换
优化简洁横幅通知功能，横屏时收到通知都将以简洁横幅通知形态显示，减少打扰
优化简洁通知操作手势，收到简洁横幅通知时也可以下滑通知，以浮窗形式显示通知应用界面
优化点击简洁横幅菜单按钮后的界面跳转形式，由原来的全屏显示改为浮窗显示，减少打扰
优化横屏时横幅通知显示位置，减少遮挡，降低打扰

【网络通信】
新增在无网络情况下，可通过无网畅聊给附近的人发送文字、图片和语音消息，方便与同伴联系（设置-移动网络-无网畅聊）

【系统】
更新 Android 安全补丁至 2025 年 8 月，提升系统安全性
修复开启 USB 网络共享后，电脑端概率性无法上网问题
packageInfoDetail.updateDescEnglish:
【Effortless AI at every moment】
Adds the "Pay bills" widget in Breeno Suggestions. It extracts your utility bills (water, electricity, and gas) from text messages and reminds you to pay them on time.
Breeno Suggestions and Live Alerts now display movie tickets saved in Breeno Memory, allowing you to quickly present them at the entrance.
Breeno Suggestions and Live Alerts now display tickets for tourist attractions saved in Breeno Memory, allowing you to quickly present them at the entrance.
Breeno Suggestions now displays hotel booking information saved in Breeno Memory as check-in reminders.
Replaces Global Search at the bottom of the Home screen with Breeno for easier access.

【Unlock a new level of seamless experience】
Improves the animations for opening, repositioning, and resizing a floating window.

【Delight in details】
Browser now includes new tools to summarize, translate, and convert documents to PDF, Word, or Excel formats.
Split View is no longer restricted to fixed ratios. You can now adjust the ratio as needed. In Split View, when two apps are displayed in landscape, you can now drag the divider to adjust their relative sizes.
You can now share images and videos in Private Safe.
You can now customize image or video album covers in Private Safe.
You can now sort and view images and videos by time in Private Safe.
You can now add files directly under the "Other files" category in Private Safe.
Fusion Desktop - Small Window now supports switching to the classic casting mode, allowing for seamless navigation and music playback.
When recent tasks are stacked, you can now modify an app's lock status by swiping down on the app on the recent tasks screen.
You can now add an unlimited number of files to Private Safe in Documents at once, instead of the previous limit of 500.
You can now select and delete all messages without verifying your fingerprint or password.
Improves the layout of the music player capsule on the car display. You can now play, pause, and switch songs directly in the music player capsule.
Clock-related widgets now switch between light and dark modes based on system settings.
All notifications received in landscape mode are now displayed in a simplified banner format to reduce interruptions.
You can now swipe down on a simplified banner notification to display the app in a floating window.
Tapping a button on a simplified banner notification now opens the app in a floating window instead of full screen, reducing interruptions.
Adjusts the position of banner notifications in landscape mode to minimize distractions.

【Network connections】
You can now send text, image, and voice messages to nearby people via BeaconLink when there is no internet connection. You can find this feature in "Settings - Mobile network - BeaconLink".

【System】
Integrates the August 2025 Android security patch to enhance system security.
Fixes an issue where your PC might be unable to connect to the network after USB tethering is turned on.

packageInfoDetail.updateDesc:
【相机】
优化实况照片的分辨率和防抖效果，画质更好
【通信互联】
新增远程控制 Windows 电脑功能，支持远程访问电脑文件和控制电脑屏幕，实现远程轻办公和文件远程互传
新增跨屏互联时支持手机不开启 WLAN 开关就可进行通信共享
优化部分蜂窝网络环境下的网络算法，提升上网流畅性
【应用】
新增游戏相机功能，支持一键回录和实况截屏，记录游戏中的每一个精彩瞬间
新增 AI 文档支持思维导图功能，可一键生成思维导图，还能以图片形式分享和导出
新增使用技巧应用图标，帮你解锁更多好用有趣功能
新增小布记忆功能，三指上滑随时触发屏幕闪记，存储于小布记忆 APP 内；小布记忆 APP 内支持信息解析摘要，按内容一键归类于合集内，海量信息高效整理，实现一站式记忆管理
新增“决胜巅峰”游戏的碰一碰组队功能，在游戏组队界面将手机靠近，就能实现快速组队
【多媒体】
新增扬声器清灰排水功能，有助于保持扬声器的良好效果（手机管家-常用工具-更多-辅助功能-清灰排水）
新增声音分轨功能，支持调节音乐中人声、背景声的音量
【系统】
新增系统导航唤醒小布开关，方便操作（设置-系统与更新-系统导航方式）
新增系统支持在非安全渠道安装的应用获取敏感权限时进行主动拦截，防止恶意应用轻易获取敏感权限，保护隐私
新增降低白点值功能，提升白色敏感人群使用舒适度（设置-辅助功能-无障碍-视觉-降低白点值）
新增在设置中搜索支持空格模糊搜索，优化搜索结果
新增支持在设置中搜索应用名称，方便查看应用详情并管理应用
优化点击浮窗浮标时的响应速度，操作更流畅
优化控制中心和通知中心退出动效，快速响应桌面或应用操作，提升面板过渡流畅性
优化锁屏快捷功能入口启动动效，无缝过渡进入应用界面，提升使用体验
优化锁屏通知堆叠效果，通知较多时，在最后一条以摘要形式呈现未展示的通知数量及来源
优化键盘按键布局，操作更便捷，视觉更美观
优化部分场景下导航条背景色与应用颜色显示效果，提升色彩显示一致性
优化最近任务锁定功能，支持让更多应用在后台保持运行
优化在设置中搜索时，部分搜索结果的排序
优化指纹显示效果
提升系统稳定性
修复部分场景下使用三指上滑后，低概率无法触发一键闪记问题
修复三指上滑触发一键闪记后，小布记忆内 AI 摘要低概率生成失败问题
修复低概率升级失败问题
更新 Android 安全补丁至 2025 年 6 月，提升系统安全性
packageInfoDetail.updateDescEnglish:
【Camera】
Enhances the image quality of live photos by improving resolution and anti-shake effects.
【Communication & interconnection】
Adds remote control support for Windows PC. You can now control your PC and access PC files remotely with your mobile device.
Adds support for sharing communication functions without turning on Wi-Fi on the phone when using Multi-Screen Connect.
Improves the cellular network algorithm for smoother network connections.

【Apps】
Introduces Game Camera, which provides Live screenshots and Flashback recording to help you capture your epic gaming moments.
Adds the Mind mapping feature in Documents. It allows you to generate mind maps with one tap, and export them to Photos or share them.
Adds the app icon for Tips to the Home screen. Discover more interesting features now!
Adds the Breeno Memory feature. You can now swipe up with 3 fingers to add screen content to the app as a memory. The app can also analyze and summarize the memories for you, as well as archive them as collections.
Adds the "Tap to team up" feature in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang. You can quickly team up by bringing your phones close together with the team-up page opened.
【Multimedia】
Adds the Speaker cleaner feature, which can clean speakers and ensure optimal speaker performance. You can change the settings for this feature in "Phone Manager - Tools - More - Accessibility & convenience - Speaker cleaner".
Adds the Track Splitter feature, which allows for the adjustment of volume for vocals and background sounds in music.
【System】
Adds the option to wake Breeno in system navigation. You can change the settings for this feature in "Settings - System & update - System navigation".
The system can now actively trigger an interception when apps installed through non-secure sources require sensitive permissions.
Adds an option to reduce white point, which enhances the comfort level of people with color sensitivity. This option is available in "Settings - Accessibility & convenience - Accessibility - Vision - Reduce white point".
You can now perform fuzzy searches with spaces in Settings.
You can now search for app names in Settings to quickly view app details or manage the app.
Improves the floating bar responsiveness of floating windows.
Improves the animation when exiting Quick Settings and the Notification drawer for better responsiveness and smoother transitions.
You can now seamlessly open an app from quick functions when the screen is locked.
When notifications are stacked, the latest notification will now display a summary showing the number of undisplayed notifications and their sources.
Improves the keyboard layout for more convenient operations and more appealing visuals.
Improves the color effect of the navigation bar background and app icons in some scenarios for better consistency of colors.
Improves the Recent tasks feature, which now supports more apps to run in the background.
Optimizes the display order of search results in Settings.
Improves the display effect of fingerprints.
Improves system stability.
Fixes an issue where MemoClip may fail to trigger after swiping up with three fingers.
Fixes an issue where Breeno Memory may fail to generate AI summaries after triggering MemoClip by swiping up with three fingers.
Fixes an issue that could cause update failures.
Integrates the June 2025 Android security patch to enhance system security.
